translations.text: and he went after the man of Israel into the tent-chamber, and thrust both of them through, the man of Israel and the woman through her belly. And the plague was stayed from the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And those that died in the plague were twenty-four thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, hath turned my wrath away from the children of Israel, in that he was jealous with my jealousy among them, so that I consumed not the children of Israel in my jealousy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Therefore say, Behold, I give unto him my covenant of peace!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he shall have it, and his seed after him, the covenant of an everlasting priesthood; because he was jealous for hisGod, and made atonement for the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the name of the man of Israel that was slain, who was slain with the Midianitish woman, was Zimri, the son of Salu, the prince of a father's house of the Simeonites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the name of the Midianitish woman that was slain was Cozbi, the daughter of Zur; he was tribal head of a father's house in Midian.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Harass the Midianites, and smite them,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for they have harassed you with their wiles, wherewith they have beguiled you in the matter of Peor, and in the matter of Cozbi, the daughter of a prince of Midian, their sister, who was slain on the day of the plague because of the matter of Peor.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it came to pass after the plague, that Jehovah spoke to Moses and to Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Take the sum of the whole assembly of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, according to their fathers' houses, all that go forth to military service in Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From twenty years old and upward...; as Jehovah had commanded Moses and the children of Israel, who went forth out of the land of Egypt.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Reuben, the firstborn of Israel: the children of Reuben: [of] Enoch, the family of the Enochites; of Pallu, the family of the Palluites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Carmi, the family of the Carmites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the Reubenites; and they that were numbered of them were forty-three thousand seven hundred and thirty.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Pallu: Eliab;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the sons of Eliab were Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram. This is that Dathan and Abiram, summoned of the assembly, who contended against Moses and against Aaron in the band of Korah, when they contended against Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the earth opened its mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that band died, when the fire devoured the two hundred and fifty men; and they became a sign.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the children of Korah died not.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Simeon, after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites; of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites; of Saul, the family of the Saulites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the Simeonites, twenty-two thousand two hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The children of Gad, after their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the family of the Haggites; of Shuni, the family of the Shunites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Ozni, the family of the Oznites; of Eri, the family of the Erites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Arod, the family of the Arodites; of Areli, the family of the Arelites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the children of Gad according to those that were numbered of them, forty thousand five hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Judah: Er and Onan; and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Judah, after their families: of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites; of Pherez, the family of the Pharzites; of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Pherez: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of Judah according to those that were numbered of them, seventy-six thousand five hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Issachar, after their families: of Tola, the family of the Tolaites; of Puah, the family of the Punites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Jashub, the family of the Jashubites; of Shimron, the family of the Shimronites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of Issachar according to those that were numbered of them, sixty-four thousand three hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Zebulun, after their families: of Sered, the family of the Sardites; of Elon, the family of the Elonites; of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the Zebulunites according to those that were numbered of them, sixty thousand five hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Joseph, after their families: Manasseh and Ephraim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites (and Machir begot Gilead); of Gilead, the family of the Gileadites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Gilead: of Jeezer, the family of the Jeezerites; of Helek, the family of the Helkites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and of Asriel, the family of the Asrielites; and of Shechem, the family of the Shechemites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and of Shemida, the family of the Shemidaites; and of Hepher, the family of the Hepherites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters; and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — These are the families of Manasseh; and those that were numbered of them, fifty-two thousand seven hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Ephraim, after their families: of Shuthelah, the family of the Shuthalhites; of Becher, the family of the Bachrites; of Tahan, the family of the Tahanites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those that were numbered of them, thirty-two thousand five hundred. These are the sons of Joseph after their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Benjamin, after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites; of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites; of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Shephupham, the family of the Shuphamites; of Hupham, the family of the Huphamites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman; [of Ard] the family of the Ardites; of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Benjamin after their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty-five thousand six hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the sons of Dan, after their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These are the families of Dan after their families.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the families of the Shuhamites, according to those that were numbered of them, were sixty-four thousand four hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Asher, after their families: of Jimnah, the family of the Jimnites; of Jishvi, the family of the Jishvites; of Beriah, the family of the Beriites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the name of the daughter of Asher was Serah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the sons of Asher according to those that were numbered of them, fifty-three thousand four hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sons of Naphtali, after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites; of Guni, the family of the Gunites;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of Jezer, the family of the Jezerites; of Shillem, the family of the Shillemites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of Naphtali, according to their families; and they that were numbered of them were forty-five thousand four hundred.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These were the numbered of the children of Israel, six hundred and one thousand seven hundred and thirty.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Unto these shall the land be divided for an inheritance according to the number of the names;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to the many thou shalt increase their inheritance, and to the few thou shalt diminish their inheritance; to every one shall his inheritance be given according to those that were numbered of him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Notwithstanding the land shall be divided by lot; according to the names of the tribes of their fathers shall they inherit;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: according to lot shall his inheritance be divided to each, be they many or few in number.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the numbered of the Levites, after their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites; of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites; of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the families of the Levites: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, the family of the Korahites. — And Kohath begot Amram.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the name of Amram's wife was Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt; and she bore to Amram Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to Aaron were born Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Nadab and Abihu died, when they presented strange fire before Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And those that were numbered of the [Levites] were twenty-three thousand, all males from a month old and upward; for they were not numbered among the children of Israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are they that were numbered by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the plains of Moab, by the Jordan of Jericho.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But among these there was not a man numbered by Moses and Aaron the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah had said of them, They shall surely die in the wilderness. And there was not left a man of them, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then drew near the daughters of Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of Manasseh the son of Joseph; and these were the names of his daughters: Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they stood before Moses, and before Eleazar the priest, and before the princes and the whole assembly, at the entrance of the tent of meeting, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our father died in the wilderness, and he was not in the band of them that banded themselves together against Jehovah in the band of Korah; but he died in his own sin, and he had no sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Why should the name of our father be taken away from his family, because he has no son? Give unto us a possession among the brethren of our father.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses brought their cause before Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The daughters of Zelophehad speak right: thou shalt surely give them a possession of an inheritance among their father's brethren; and thou shalt cause the inheritance of their father to pass unto them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And unto the children of Israel shalt thou speak, saying, If a man die, and have no son, then ye shall cause his inheritance to pass unto his daughter.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if he have no daughter, ye shall give his inheritance unto his brethren.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if he have no brethren, ye shall give his inheritance unto his father's brethren.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if his father have no brethren, ye shall give his inheritance to his kinsman that is nearest to him in his family, and he shall possess it; and it shall be unto the children of Israel a statute of right, as Jehovah commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah said to Moses, Get thee up into this mount Abarim, and see the land that I have given unto the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when thou hast seen it, thou also shalt be gathered unto thy peoples, as Aaron thy brother was gathered,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: because ye rebelled against my word in the wilderness of Zin, in the strife of the congregation, as to hallowing me in the matter of the water before their eyes. (That is the water of Meribah at Kadesh in the wilderness of Zin.)

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses spoke to Jehovah, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let Jehovah, theGod of the spirits of all flesh, set a man over the assembly,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who may go out before them, and who may come in before them, and who may lead them out, and who may bring them in, that the assembly of Jehovah be not as sheep that have no shepherd.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah said to Moses, Take Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom is the Spirit, and thou shalt lay thy hand upon him;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and thou shalt set him before Eleazar the priest, and before the whole assembly; and give him commandment before their eyes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And thou shalt put of thine honour upon him, that the whole assembly of the children of Israel may obey him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he shall stand before Eleazar the priest, who shall inquire for him, by the judgment of the Urim before Jehovah: at his word shall they go out, and at his word they shall come in, he, and all the children of Israel with him, even the whole assembly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses did as Jehovah had commanded him; and he took Joshua and set him before Eleazar the priest, and before the whole assembly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he laid his hands upon him, and gave him commandment, as Jehovah had said through Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them, My offering, my bread for my offerings by fire of sweet odour to me, shall ye take heed to present to me at their set time.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And say unto them, This is the offering by fire which ye shall present to Jehovah: two yearling lambs without blemish, day by day, as a continual burnt-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning, and the other lamb thou shalt offer between the two evenings;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and a tenth part of an ephah of fine flour for an oblation, mingled with beaten oil, a fourth part of a hin:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [it is] the continual burnt-offering which was ordained on mount Sinai for a sweet odour, an offering by fire to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the drink-offering thereof shall be a fourth part of a hin for one lamb; in the sanctuary shall the drink-offering of strong drink be poured out to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the second lamb thou shalt offer between the two evenings; [with the] like oblation as that of the morning, and the like drink-offering, shalt thou offer it as an offering by fire of a sweet odour to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the sabbath day two yearling lambs without blemish, and two tenth parts of fine flour as an oblation, mingled with oil, and the drink-offering thereof:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: it is the burnt-offering of the sabbath, for each sabbath besides the continual burnt-offering, and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in the beginnings of your months ye shall present a burnt-offering to Jehovah: two young bullocks, and one ram, seven yearling lambs without blemish.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And three tenth parts of fine flour as an oblation, mingled with oil, for one bullock; and two tenth parts of fine flour as an oblation, mingled with oil, for the ram;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and a tenth part of fine flour mingled with oil as an oblation for each lamb: [it is] a burnt-offering of a sweet odour, an offering by fire to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their drink-offerings: half a hin of wine for a bullock, and the third part of a hin for the ram, and the fourth part of a hin for a lamb. This is the monthly burnt-offering for each month throughout the months of the year.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And a buck of the goats shall be offered, for a sin-offering to Jehovah, besides the continual burnt-offering, and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, is the passover to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the fifteenth day of this month is the feast; seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: On the first day shall be a holy convocation: no manner of servile work shall ye do;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye shall present an offering by fire, a burnt-offering to Jehovah: two young bullocks, and one ram, and seven yearling lambs; they shall be unto you without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation shall be of fine flour mingled with oil: three tenth parts shall ye offer for a bullock, and two tenth parts for the ram;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: one tenth part shalt thou offer for each lamb, of the seven lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and a he-goat as a sin-offering, to make atonement for you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Besides the burnt-offering of the morning, which is for a continual burnt-offering, shall ye offer this.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: After this manner ye shall offer daily, seven days, the bread of the offering by fire of a sweet odour to Jehovah; it shall be offered besides the continual burnt-offering, and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the seventh day ye shall have a holy convocation; no manner of servile work shall ye do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the day of the first-fruits, when ye present a new oblation to Jehovah, after your weeks, ye shall have a holy convocation: no manner of servile work shall ye do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall present a burnt-offering for a sweet odour to Jehovah: two young bullocks, one ram, seven yearling lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation of fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for one bullock, two tenth parts for the ram,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: one tenth part for each lamb of the seven lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [and] one buck of the goats, to make atonement for you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye shall offer them besides the continual burnt-offering, and its oblation (without blemish shall they be unto you), and their drink-offerings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in the seventh month, on the first of the month, ye shall have a holy convocation: no manner of servile work shall ye do; a day of blowing the trumpets shall it be unto you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall offer a burnt-offering for a sweet odour to Jehovah: one young bullock, one ram, seven yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation of fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the ram,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one tenth part for each lamb of the seven lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one buck of the goats for a sin-offering, to make atonement for you,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — besides the monthly burnt-offering and its oblation, and the continual burnt-offering and its oblation, and their drink-offerings, according to their ordinance, for a sweet odour, an offering by fire to Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the tenth of this seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls; no manner of work shall ye do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall present a burnt-offering to Jehovah for a sweet odour: one young bullock, one ram, seven yearling lambs (without blemish shall they be unto you);

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation of fine flour mingled with oil, three tenth parts for the bullock, two tenth parts for the ram,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: one tenth part for each lamb, of the seven lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [and] one buck of the goats for a sin-offering, — besides the sin-offering of atonement, and the continual burnt-offering and its oblation, and their drink-offerings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have a holy convocation: no manner of servile work shall ye do; and ye shall celebrate a feast to Jehovah seven days;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye shall present a burnt-offering, an offering by fire for a sweet odour to Jehovah: thirteen young bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs (they shall be without blemish);

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation of fine flour mingled with oil: three tenth parts for each bullock of the thirteen bullocks, two tenth parts for each ram of the two rams,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one tenth part for each lamb of the fourteen lambs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one buck of the goats for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering, its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the second day, [ye shall present] twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one buck of the goats for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering and its oblation, and their drink-offerings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the third day, eleven bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering and its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the fourth day, ten bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one buck of the goats for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering, its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the fifth day, nine bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering and its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the sixth day, eight bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering, its oblation and its drink-offerings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And on the seventh day, seven bullocks, two rams, fourteen yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to their ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering, its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: On the eighth day ye shall have a solemn assembly: no manner of servile work shall ye do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall present a burnt-offering, an offering by fire of a sweet odour to Jehovah: one bullock, one ram, seven yearling lambs without blemish;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: their oblation and their drink-offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, by their number, according to the ordinance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and one he-goat for a sin-offering, — besides the continual burnt-offering and its oblation and its drink-offering.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These shall ye offer to Jehovah in your set feasts, besides your vows, and your voluntary-offerings, for your burnt-offerings, and for your oblations, and for your drink-offerings, and for your peace-offerings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses told the children of Israel according to all that Jehovah had commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses spoke to the heads of the tribes of the children of Israel, saying, This is what Jehovah hath commanded.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If a man vow a vow to Jehovah, or swear an oath to bind his soul with a bond, he shall not break his word; according to all that hath gone out of his mouth shall he do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If a woman also vow a vow to Jehovah, and bind herself by a bond, in her father's house in her youth,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and her father hear her vow, and her bond wherewith she hath bound her soul, and her father shall be silent at her, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if her father prohibited her in the day that he heard, none of her vows, or of her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand; and Jehovah shall pardon her, because her father prohibited her.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if she have a husband, when she hath her vow upon her or ought that hath passed her lips wherewith she hath bound her soul,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and her husband hear it and be silent at her in the day that he heareth it, then her vows shall stand, and her bonds wherewith she bound her soul shall stand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if her husband prohibit her on the day that he heareth it, and annul her vow which is upon her, and what hath passed her lips, wherewith she hath bound her soul, then Jehovah shall pardon her.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the vow of a widow, and of her that is divorced, — everything wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand against her.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if she have vowed in her husband's house, or have bound her soul by an oath with a bond,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and her husband have heard it, and been silent at her, and hath not prohibited her, then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if her husband have expressly annulled them on the day that he heard them, then nothing of that which is gone out of her lips as to her vows or the bond on her soul, shall stand: her husband hath annulled them; and Jehovah will pardon her.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Every vow, and every binding oath to afflict the soul, her husband can establish it, or her husband can annul it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if her husband be altogether silent at her from day to day, then he hath established all her vows or all her bonds which are upon her; he hath confirmed them, for he hath been silent at her in the day that he heard them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if he in any way annul them after he hath heard them, then he shall bear her iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the statutes, which Jehovah commanded Moses, between a man and his wife, between a father and his daughter, in her youth in her father's house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Avenge the children of Israel upon the Midianites; afterwards shalt thou be gathered unto thy peoples.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses spoke to the people, saying, Arm from amongst you men for military service, that they go against Midian to execute Jehovah's vengeance upon Midian.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of every tribe a thousand, of all the tribes of Israel, shall ye send to the war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there were levied out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand by tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses sent them to the war, a thousand by the tribe, them and Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war, and the holy instruments, even the alarm-trumpets in his hand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they warred against Midian, as Jehovah had commanded Moses, and slew all the males.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they slew the kings of Midian, besides the others slain, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, five kings of Midian; and Balaam the son of Beor they slew with the sword.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel took the women of Midian captives, and their little ones, and took for a spoil all their cattle and all their flocks and all their goods;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and all their cities in their settlements and all their encampments they burned with fire.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they took all the booty, and all the prey, of man and of cattle;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they brought to Moses and Eleazar the priest, and to the assembly of the children of Israel, the captives and the prey and the booty, to the camp in the plains of Moab, which are by the Jordan of Jericho.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest and all the princes of the assembly went forth to meet them outside the camp.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses was wroth with the officers of the army, with the captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, who came from the service of the war;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Moses said to them, Have ye saved all the women alive?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Lo, these, through the counsel of Balaam, caused the children of Israel to commit sin against Jehovah in the matter of Peor, and there was a plague on the assembly of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And now slay every male among the little ones, and slay every woman that hath known man by lying with him,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but all the children among the women that have not known lying with a man, keep alive for yourselves.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And encamp outside the camp seven days; whoever hath killed a person, and whoever hath touched any slain; ye shall purify yourselves on the third day, and on the seventh day, you and your captives.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And every garment, and every vessel of skin, and all work of goat's hair, and every utensil of wood shall ye purify.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Eleazar the priest said to the men of war that had gone to the battle, This is the statute of the law which Jehovah hath commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Only the gold, and the silver, the copper, the iron, the tin, and the lead,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: everything that passeth through the fire, ye shall make it go through the fire, and it shall be clean; only it shall be purified with the water of separation; and everything that cannot pass through the fire ye shall make go through the water.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall wash your garments on the seventh day, and ye shall be clean; and afterwards ye may come into the camp.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Take the sum of the prey that was taken, of man and of cattle, thou, and Eleazar the priest, and the chief fathers of the assembly;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and divide the prey into halves, between them that conducted the war, who went out to the battle, and the whole assembly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And thou shalt levy a tribute for Jehovah of the men of war who went out to the army, one soul of five hundred of the persons, and of the oxen, and of the asses, and of the small cattle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Of their half shall ye take it, and give it unto Eleazar the priest, for a heave-offering of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the children of Israel's half, thou shalt take one portion of fifty, of the persons, of the oxen, of the asses, and of the small cattle, of every [kind of] beasts, and thou shalt give them unto the Levites, who keep the charge of the tabernacle of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest did as Jehovah had commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the prey, the rest of the spoil, which the men of war had taken, was six hundred and seventy-five thousand sheep,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and seventy-two thousand oxen,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and sixty-one thousand asses,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and of human persons, of the women that had not known lying with a man, all the persons were thirty-two thousand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the half, the portion of them that had gone out to the war, was in number three hundred and thirty-seven thousand five hundred sheep,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the tribute for Jehovah of the sheep was six hundred and seventy-five;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the oxen were thirty-six thousand, and the tribute thereof for Jehovah, seventy-two;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the asses were thirty thousand five hundred, and the tribute thereof for Jehovah, sixty-one;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the human persons were sixteen thousand, of whom the tribute for Jehovah was thirty-two persons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses gave the tribute of Jehovah's heave-offering to Eleazar the priest, as Jehovah had commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of the children of Israel's half, which Moses had divided, [taking it] from the men that served in the war,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: (now the half belonging to the assembly was of the sheep, three hundred and thirty-seven thousand five hundred,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and thirty-six thousand oxen,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and thirty thousand five hundred asses,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and sixteen thousand human persons,)

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: ...of the children of Israel's half, Moses took one portion of fifty, of man and of cattle, and gave them to the Levites who kept the charge of the tabernacle of Jehovah; as Jehovah had commanded Moses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the officers who were over the thousands of the host, the captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, came near to Moses,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they said to Moses, Thy servants have taken the sum of the men of war who were under our hand, and there is not one man of us lacking.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So we present the offering of Jehovah, that which each one hath found, jewels of gold, chains, and bracelets, rings, earrings, and necklaces, to make atonement for our souls before Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of them, all manner of wrought jewels.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And all the gold of the heave-offering that they offered to Jehovah was sixteen thousand seven hundred and fifty shekels, from the captains of thousands and the captains of hundreds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: (The men of war had taken spoil each one for himself.)

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tent of meeting, as a memorial for the children of Israel before Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had much cattle, a very great multitude; and they saw the land of Jaazer, and the land of Gilead, and behold, the place was a place for cattle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spoke to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the princes of the assembly, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jaazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elaleh, and Sebam, and Nebo, and Beon,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the country that Jehovah smote before the assembly of Israel, is a land for cattle, and thy servants have cattle;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they said, If we have found favour in thine eyes, let this land be given to thy servants for a possession: bring us not over the Jordan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses said to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, Shall your brethren go to war, and shall ye abide here?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And why do ye discourage the children of Israel from going over into the land that Jehovah has given them?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thus did your fathers, when I sent them from Kadesh-barnea to see the land:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: they went up to the valley of Eshcol, and saw the land, and discouraged the children of Israel, that they should not go into the land that Jehovah had given them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah's anger was kindled the same time, and he swore, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land that I swore to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob! for they have not wholly followed me;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite, and Joshua the son of Nun; for they have wholly followed Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah's anger was kindled against Israel, and he made them wander in the wilderness forty years, until the whole generation was consumed that had done evil in the eyes of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And behold, ye are risen up in your fathers' stead, a progeny of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of Jehovah toward Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If ye turn away from after him, he will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and ye shall destroy all this people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they drew near to him, and said, We will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but we ourselves will go with diligence armed before the children of Israel, until we have brought them to their place; and our little ones shall dwell in the strong cities because of the inhabitants of the land.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We will not return to our houses, until the children of Israel have inherited each one his inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For we will not inherit with them on yonder side the Jordan, and further, because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side the Jordan eastward.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses said to them, If ye do this thing, if ye arm yourselves before Jehovah for war,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and all of you that are armed go over the Jordan before Jehovah, until he have dispossessed his enemies from before him,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the land is subdued before Jehovah, and afterwards ye return, ye shall be guiltless toward Jehovah and toward Israel, and this land shall be your possession before Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if ye do not do so, behold, ye have sinned against Jehovah, and be sure your sin will find you out.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Build yourselves cities for your little ones, and folds for your flocks, and do that which has gone out of your mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spoke to Moses, saying, Thy servants will do as my lord commands.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our little ones, our wives, our cattle, and all our beasts shall be there in the cities of Gilead;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but thy servants will pass over, every one armed for war, before Jehovah to battle, as my lord says.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So concerning them Moses commanded Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses said unto them, If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben pass with you over the Jordan, every one armed for battle, before Jehovah, and the land be subdued before you, then ye shall give them the land of Gilead for a possession;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but if they do not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying, As Jehovah has said to thy servants, so will we do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We will pass over armed before Jehovah into the land of Canaan, and the possession of our inheritance on this side the Jordan shall be ours.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses gave to them, to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, and to half the tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, and the kingdom of Og the king of Bashan, the land, according to its cities and territories, the cities of the land round about.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Atroth-Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbebah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Beth-Nimrah, and Beth-haran, strong cities, and sheepfolds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the children of Reuben built Heshbon, and Elaleh, and Kirjathaim,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Nebo, and Baal-meon (of which the names were changed), and Sibmah; and they gave other names to the cities that they built.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: — And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and they dispossessed the Amorites that were therein.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses gave Gilead to Machir the son of Manasseh; and he dwelt therein.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took their hamlets, and called them Havoth-Jair.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Nobah went and took Kenath, and its dependent villages, and called it Nobah, after his name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the journeys of the children of Israel, who went forth out of the land of Egypt according to their armies under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses wrote their goings out according to their journeys by the commandment of Jehovah; and these are their journeys according to their goings out.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They journeyed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month. On the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with a high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the Egyptians buried those whom Jehovah had smitten among them, all the firstborn; and upon theirgods Jehovah executed judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the children of Israel removed from Rameses, and encamped in Succoth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Succoth and encamped in Etham, which is at the end of the wilderness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Etham, and turned back to Pi-hahiroth, which is opposite Baal-Zephon, and encamped before Migdol.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from before Hahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and went three days' journey in the wilderness of Etham, and encamped in Marah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Marah, and came to Elim; and in Elim were twelve springs of water, and seventy palm-trees, and they encamped there.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Elim, and encamped by the Red sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from the Red sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Dophkah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Dophkah, and encamped in Alush.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Alush, and encamped at Rephidim, where there was no water for the people to drink.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Rephidim, and encamped in the wilderness of Sinai.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from the wilderness of Sinai, and encamped at Kibroth-hattaavah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Kibroth-hattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Hazeroth, and encamped in Rithmah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Rithmah, and encamped at Rimmon-perez.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Rimmon-perez, and encamped in Libnah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Libnah, and encamped at Rissah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Rissah, and encamped in Kehelathah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Kehelathah, and encamped in mount Shapher.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Haradah, and encamped in Makheloth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Makheloth, and encamped at Tahath.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Tahath, and encamped at Terah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Terah, and encamped in Mithcah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Mithcah, and encamped in Hashmonah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Hashmonah, and encamped in Moseroth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Moseroth, and encamped in Bene-Jaakan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Bene-Jaakan, and encamped at Hor-hagidgad.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Hor-hagidgad, and encamped in Jotbathah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Jotbathah, and encamped at Abronah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Abronah, and encamped at Ezion-geber.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Ezion-geber, and encamped in the wilderness of Zin, which is Kadesh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Kadesh, and encamped in mount Hor, in the border of the land of Edom.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Aaron the priest went up mount Hor by the commandment of Jehovah, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel came out of the land of Egypt, in the fifth month, on the first of the month.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Aaron was a hundred and twenty-three years old when he died on mount Hor.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the Canaanite, the king of Arad who dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from mount Hor, and encamped in Zalmonah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Zalmonah, and encamped in Punon.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Punon, and encamped in Oboth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Oboth, and encamped in Ijim-Abarim, in the border of Moab.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Ijim, and encamped in Dibon-Gad.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Dibon-Gad, and encamped in Almon-Diblathaim.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from Almon-Diblathaim, and encamped in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they removed from the mountains of Abarim, and encamped in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they encamped by the Jordan, from Beth-jeshimoth unto Abel-Shittim, in the plains of Moab.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye pass over Jordan into the land of Canaan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: then ye shall dispossess all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and ye shall destroy all their figured images, and all their molten images shall ye destroy, and all their high places shall ye lay waste;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye shall take possession of the land, and dwell therein, for to you have I given the land to possess it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall take for yourselves the land as an inheritance by lot according to your families: to the many ye shall increase their inheritance, and to the few thou shalt diminish their inheritance: where the lot falleth to him, there shall be each man's [inheritance]; according to the tribes of your fathers shall ye take for yourselves the inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if ye will not dispossess the inhabitants of the land from before you, those that ye let remain of them shall be thorns in your eyes, and pricks in your sides, and they shall harass you in the land wherein ye dwell.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And it shall come to pass that I will do unto you as I thought to do unto them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye come into the land of Canaan, this shall be the land that shall fall to you for an inheritance, the land of Canaan according to the borders thereof.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then your south side shall be from the wilderness of Zin alongside of Edom, and your southern border shall be from the end of the salt sea eastward;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and your border shall turn from the south of the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass on to Zin, and shall end southward at Kadesh-barnea, and shall go on to Hazar-Addar, and pass on to Azmon.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the border shall turn from Azmon unto the torrent of Egypt, and shall end at the sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And as west border ye shall have the great sea, and [its] coast. This shall be your west border.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And this shall be your north border: from the great sea ye shall mark out for you mount Hor;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: from mount Hor ye shall mark out the entrance to Hamath, and the end of the border shall be toward Zedad;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border shall go to Ziphron, and shall end at Hazar-enan. This shall be your north border.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall mark out for you as eastern border from Hazar-enan to Shepham:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall descend, and shall strike upon the extremity of the sea of Chinnereth eastward;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the border shall go down to the Jordan, and shall end at the salt sea. This shall be your land according to the borders thereof round about.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying, This is the land which ye shall take for yourselves as inheritance by lot, which Jehovah commanded to give to the nine tribes, and to the half tribe.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the tribe of the children of the Reubenites according to their fathers' houses, and the tribe of the children of the Gadites according to their fathers' houses, have received, and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the two tribes and the half tribe have received their inheritance on this side the Jordan of Jericho eastward, toward the sun-rising.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the names of the men who shall divide the land unto you: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall take one prince of every tribe, to divide the land.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And these are the names of the men: for the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Simeon, Samuel the son of Ammihud;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Dan, a prince, Bukki the son of Jogli;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for the children of Joseph: for the tribe of the children of Manasseh, a prince, Hanniel the son of Ephod,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Ephraim, a prince, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Zebulun, a prince, Elizaphan the son of Pharnach;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Issachar, a prince, Phaltiel the son of Azzan;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Asher, a prince, Ahihud the son of Shelomi;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and for the tribe of the children of Naphtali, a prince, Phedahel the son of Ammihud.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are they whom Jehovah commanded to distribute to the children of Israel their inheritance in the land of Canaan.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan of Jericho, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Command the children of Israel, that of the inheritance of their possession they give unto the Levites cities to dwell in; and a suburb for the cities round about them shall ye give unto the Levites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the cities shall they have to dwell in, and their suburbs shall be for their cattle, and for their goods, and for all their beasts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the suburbs of the cities that ye shall give unto the Levites shall be from the walls of the city outward, a thousand cubits round about.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall measure, without the city, the east side two thousand cubits, and the south side two thousand cubits, and the west side two thousand cubits, and the north side two thousand cubits, and the city shall be in the midst: they shall have this as suburbs of the cities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And [among] the cities that ye shall give unto the Levites [shall be] the six cities of refuge, which ye shall appoint for the manslayer, that he may flee thither, — and besides them ye shall give forty-two cities:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: all the cities that ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty-eight cities, they and their suburbs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the cities which ye shall give shall be of the possession of the children of Israel: from them that have much ye shall take much, and from them that have little ye shall take little; each one according to his inheritance which he will inherit shall give of his cities to the Levites.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Jehovah spoke to Moses, saying,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: then ye shall appoint for yourselves cities: cities of refuge shall they be for you; that a manslayer may flee thither, who without intent smiteth a person mortally.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall have these cities for refuge from the avenger; that the manslayer die not, until he have stood before the assembly in judgment.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the cities that ye shall give shall be six cities of refuge for you.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Three cities shall ye give on this side of the Jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of Canaan; they shall be cities of refuge.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the children of Israel, and for the stranger, and for the sojourner among them shall these six cities be a refuge, that one who smiteth a person mortally without intent may flee thither.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if he have smitten him with an instrument of iron, so that he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall certainly be put to death.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if he have smitten him with a stone from the hand, wherewith one may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall certainly be put to death.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Or if he have smitten him with an instrument of wood, in the hand, wherewith one may die, and he die, he is a murderer: the murderer shall certainly be put to death;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the avenger of blood, he shall put the murderer to death; when he meeteth him, he shall put him to death.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if he thrust at him out of hatred, or hurl at him intentionally, so that he die,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: or from enmity smite him with his hand, so that he die, he that smote him shall certainly be put to death; he is a murderer: the avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death, when he meeteth him. —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if he have thrust at him suddenly without enmity, or have cast upon him anything unintentionally,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: or [have smitten him] with any stone wherewith one may die, without seeing him, and have cast it upon him so that he die, and he was not his enemy, neither sought his harm:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: then the assembly shall judge between the smiter and the avenger of blood according to these judgments;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the assembly shall rescue the manslayer out of the hand of the avenger of blood, and the assembly shall restore him to the city of his refuge, whither he had fled; and he shall abide in it until the death of the high-priest, who was anointed with the holy oil.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if the manslayer shall in any way come outside the limits of the city of his refuge whither he hath fled,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the avenger of blood find him outside the limits of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood kill the manslayer, there shall be no blood-guiltiness upon him;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for the manslayer should have remained in the city of his refuge until the death of the high-priest; but after the death of the high-priest he may return into the land of his possession.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And this shall be unto you a statute of right throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whoever shall smite a person mortally, at the mouth of witnesses shall the murderer be put to death; but one witness shall not testify against a person to cause him to die.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall take no satisfaction for the life of a murderer, who is guilty of death, but he shall certainly be put to death.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall take no satisfaction for him that hath fled to the city of his refuge, that he should come again to dwell in the land, until the death of the priest.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are; for blood, it polluteth the land; and there can be no atonement made for the land, for the blood that hath been shed therein, but by the blood of him that shed it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And ye shall not defile the land that ye inhabit, in the midst whereof I dwell; for I am Jehovah who dwell in the midst of the children of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the chief fathers of families of the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of the sons of Joseph, came near, and spoke before Moses, and before the princes, the chief fathers of the children of Israel:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and they said, Jehovah commanded my lord to give the land for an inheritance by lot to the children of Israel; and my lord was commanded by Jehovah to give the inheritance of Zelophehad our brother to his daughters.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now if they be married to any of the sons of the [other] tribes of the children of Israel, then shall their inheritance be taken from the inheritance of our fathers, and shall be added to the inheritance of the tribe to which they shall belong; and it shall be taken from the lot of our inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when the jubilee of the children of Israel shall come, then shall their inheritance be added to the inheritance of the tribe to which they shall belong; and their inheritance shall be taken away from the inheritance of the tribe of our fathers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Moses commanded the children of Israel according to the word of Jehovah, saying, The tribe of the sons of Joseph hath said well.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is the thing which Jehovah hath commanded concerning the daughters of Zelophehad, saying, Let them marry whom they please; only they shall marry one of the tribe of their father,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that no inheritance of the children of Israel pass from tribe to tribe; for every one of the children of Israel shall keep to the inheritance of the tribe of his fathers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And every daughter that possesseth an inheritance among the tribes of the children of Israel, shall be married to one of the family of the tribe of her father, that the children of Israel may possess every one the inheritance of his fathers,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and the inheritance shall not pass from one tribe to another tribe; for each of the tribes of the children of Israel shall keep to his inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Even as Jehovah had commanded Moses, so did the daughters of Zelophehad;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Mahlah, Tirzah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Noah, the daughters of Zelophehad, were married unto their uncles' sons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To those that were of the families of the sons of Manasseh the son of Joseph were they married; and their inheritance remained in the tribe of the family of their father.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are the commandments and the ordinances which Jehovah commanded through Moses to the children of Israel, in the plains of Moab, by the Jordan of Jericho.
